# Nilo Merino Recalde

Researcher, developer, and designer. My work sits between research, computation, and visual communication — I build analytical tools, machine learning systems, and data visualisations that help researchers and organisations understand complex data and communicate it clearly. I run sedum.studio, a small studio at the intersection of data science and design. I hold a PhD in Biology from the University of Oxford and am a Senior Conservation Scientist at the RSPB; earlier in my career I worked in documentary film across three continents.

## Current roles
- Senior Conservation Scientist, RSPB — leading statistical analysis for the Big Garden Birdwatch, one of the world's largest citizen science projects
- Visiting Researcher, University of Oxford, Department of Biology
- Founder & Lead Designer, sedum.studio — data science and design consultancy
- Data Visualization Consultant, Cornell University — BirdNET citizen science project

## Expertise
Data analysis and machine learning · Statistical modelling · Scientific research · Citizen science · Spatial analysis · Custom software development · Interactive visualisation

## Selected publications
Research published in Current Biology, Methods in Ecology and Evolution. Covered by international media.

## Skills
Data analysis and visualisation · Machine learning · Statistical modelling · Software development · Interactive tools · Research communication · Visual design
